creator: ports@thelanman.net
text:
On a default install support for the rxvt-unicode terminal is not present in the termcap file.

Fix: Add the termcap entry to /usr/share/misc/termcap  and  cap_mkdb to create the termcap.db file.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: SSH in from any other machine using a rxvt-unicode shell.
